en: So do I.
Neither does she.
Nor did he come.
So did they.
Neither do I.
I think so.
I hope so.
I suppose so.
I am afraid so.
I think not.
I hope not.
I am afraid not.
Do you want to go? I would like to.
Can you help me? I would be happy to.

zh: 她说她会来，但她没有来。
en: She said she would come, but she did not.

zh: 他打算去，但后来决定不去了。
en: He planned to go but decided not to.
You should have told me earlier.
She could have helped us.

zh: 他们本不必那么担心的。
en: They need not have worried so much.

zh: 如果天气好的话，我们就去。
en: If the weather is fine, we will go.
He is clever and so is she.

zh: 他不喜欢咖啡，我也不喜欢。
en: He does not like coffee and neither do I.
She went to Paris and so did he.

zh: 他没有通过考试，她也没有。
en: He did not pass the exam and neither did she.
I like this film. What about you?

zh: 当被问到时，他说他不知道。
en: When asked, he said he did not know.

zh: 如果可能的话，请早点来。
en: If possible, please come early.

zh: 如果有必要的话，我们可以推迟会议。
en: If necessary, we can postpone the meeting.

zh: 虽然很难，但他还是坚持下来了。
en: Though difficult, he persisted.

zh: 尽管疲惫，她还是完成了工作。
en: Although tired, she finished the work.
